meaning: n.[植](美国东南部产的)越橘,兔眼乌饭树
examples: The major kinds of blueberry plants are highbush, half-high, lowbush and rabbiteye.
Rabbiteye plants like warmer temperatures. Some of these bushes grow three meters tall.
Several factors on affecting rabbiteye blueberry bud induction, differentiation and plant regeneration were studied.
